slots.title: Markdown Tables
slots.body:
Here is a standard markdown table testing various alignments and column widths:

| Default Align | Left Align | Center Align | Right Align |
| ------------- | :--------- | :----------: | ----------: |
| Cell 1,1 | Cell 1,2 | Cell 1,3 | Cell 1,4 |
| A longer text cell | Short | **Bold** text | *Italic* text |
| Row 3 | Data | Data | Data |

We also need to make sure that text occurring after the table renders correctly.
